about.title: About
about.content: Full-stack web developer, 4k+ stars on open source projects. Used to write code with React, Next.js, TypeScript -- now I write code with Claude Code and Codex. Mass-produced programmer turned typist (jk). Occasionally goes unhinged on the blog.

projects.title: Projects
projects.esDragerSub: Open Source Drag Component Library | Vue.js, React, TypeScript
projects.esDragerDesc:
- Drag, resize, and rotate component library for Vue and React, 500+ weekly npm downloads.
- Features snap alignment, grid system, and boundary constraints with full documentation site.
projects.vtableDesc:
- Contributed to a high-performance multidimensional data analysis table library by ByteDance VisActor team.
- Supports million-row rendering, Gantt charts, custom editors, and chart integration.
projects.prohelenSub: Visual Prompt Engineering Platform | Next.js, React
projects.prohelenDesc:
- No-code visual prompt engineering platform for building, managing, and sharing AI workflows.
- Drag-and-drop blocks, real-time preview, reusable templates, and API integration.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.cofounderDesc: - Building Movorca, an AI storytelling platform. The core idea: move audiences with narrative — not slides, but immersive visual stories with rhythm and scroll-driven engagement.
experience.fullstackCompany: 上海象多网络科技有限公司
experience.fullstackDesc: - Worked on Sector 0x, an AI-driven virtual town where AI residents autonomously live, socialize, and create stories.
experience.digitmasterCompany: 数宗科技（上海）有限公司
experience.digitmasterDesc:
- Led frontend architecture migration, unifying project structure and build pipeline.
- Built an AI chat interface with streaming responses and multi-turn conversation.
- Drove code refactoring and internationalization implementation.
experience.telepaceCompany: 上海格子互动信息技术有限公司
experience.telepaceDesc: - Explored the future of voice-based surveys, building an AI-powered voice interaction survey platform.
experience.kanjiangainianCompany: 看见概念（上海）智能科技有限公司
experience.kanjiangainianDesc: - Worked on NieTa, an AI-native creative community where users generate virtual characters through natural language and build worlds around them.
experience.yidaCompany: 壹沓科技（上海）有限公司
experience.yidaDesc: - Built UI components and integrated REST APIs in a production codebase.

awards.title: Awards
awards.outstandingDesc: - Awarded as an outstanding student for academic excellence.
awards.scholarshipDesc: - Received a scholarship for outstanding performance in subject competitions.

terminal.title: Orion's Terminal
terminal.aboutBio: A software engineer who loves building elegant solutions and exploring new technologies. Currently focused on AI agent development and always learning something new 🚀
